subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth, wherein are those things that draw men nigh unto God, the Most High, the Most Great. Blessed is he who holdeth fast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق و فیه ما یقرب الناس الی الله العلی العظیم طوبی لمن تمسک
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity of thought and belief, @call to action
